finding: Pre-commit blocked evidence files with evidence-file-missing-task-context but did not provide a requiredCommand, leaving the operator to infer that the related task ledger/event files must be staged.
expectedBehavior: Protected-state findings should include a concrete repair command or an auto-stage hint when the missing context is the same task's ledger/event files.
evidenceOrRepro: Fallback commit with ATM_COMMIT_TASK_ID for ATM-GOV-0195 failed with ATM_HOOK_PRE_COMMIT_DEFERRED_GOVERNANCE_REQUIRED. Findings: ATM_PROTECTED_STATE_EVIDENCE_FILE_MISSING_TASK_CONTEXT for .atm/history/evidence/ATM-GOV-0195*. requiredCommand was null. Staging .atm/history/tasks/ATM-GOV-0195.json and .atm/history/task-events/ATM-GOV-0195 resolved it.
followUp: Add same-task context repair hints and tests for evidence-only staged changes after evidence run / runner-sync receipt creation.
